titlestmt.titleproper: John W. Spencer Nature Study papers21-24-238
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-03-25 23:51:02 -0400.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: John W. Spencer Nature Study papers
did.abstract: Correspondence about nature study leaflets, agricultural problems, including some with members of the state legislature and some personal correspondence.
Also, an engraved silver goblet given to Mr. and Mrs. John Walton Spencer, June 11-12, 1912.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Deborah Cooper and Marcie Farwell, November 2017

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Deputy Chief of Extension Work, Cornell University.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence about nature study leaflets, agricultural problems, including some with members of the state legislature and some personal correspondence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also, an engraved silver goblet given to Mr. and Mrs. John Walton Spencer, June 11-12, 1912.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: John W. Spencer Papers, #21-24-238. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence sent to John W. Spencer, primarily requesting Nature Leaflet reports, from schoolchildren, teachers and other educators. A small number of letters are more personal in nature.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter inquiring whether John Spencer is related to other Spencers in the state; also a letter from his cousin Edgar A. Spencer.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter describing the plight of farmers in society (Jan 28).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letters from Anna Comstock, J. H. Comstock, Martha Van Rensselaer.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from Martha Van Rensselaer

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from Anna Comstock

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter signed "Comstock", probably J.H.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from a teacher (Jackson) at Tuskagee Normal and Industrial Institute during the period when Booker T. Washington was Principal.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes telegram from Albany, "Bill signed today" re: Nixon Bill.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from his Cousin; Includes letter from Martha Van Renssalaer

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes passenger list for American Line sailing from NY to Southampton, with LH Bailey listed as passenger.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes brief letter from LH Bailey in Strasbourg regarding edits to manuscript.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from G. W. Carver when Director of Tuskagee Normal and Industrial Institute

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from Martha Van Rensselaer

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Spencer's response to earlier letter regarding family geneaology (in 1-12)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from Martha Van Rensselaer

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes responsefrom a teacher (Jackson) at Tuskagee Normal and Industrial Institute during the period when Booker T. Washington was Principal.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a letter from his cousin.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from a colleague in Paris commenting on the French army; includes composition by an 18 yr old still in school entitled "The Future", commenting on many new inventions, the Spanish-Ameriacn war and imagining the future.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from cousin Edgar Spencer.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from cousin Edgar Spencer.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes clipping from "Primary Education" journal about the Bureau of Nature Study".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a request on postcard for nature leaflets from a teacher in Russia.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from Alice Donlevy, Ladies Art Association of NY, with comments on the usefulness of various leaflets.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from Martha Van Rensselaer.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from Martha Van Rensselaer.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from Anna Comstock about manuscript for chicken leaflet

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from Martha Van Rensselaer.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from Ernest Ingersoll.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from Martha Van Rensselaer.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from Martha Van Rensselaer.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a letter discussing photography
